modules/Apps-Config.md.summary: xcconfig scaffolding: signing team indirection, monotonic build counter, per-machine defaults.

modules/Apps-Lillist-iOS-Sources-App.md.summary: iOS app entry point: builds AppEnvironment object graph, runs bootstrap, and wires crash/mail transport

modules/Apps-Lillist-iOS-Sources-Setting.summary: Eight iOS Settings push-destination pages that wrap env-coupled sections inside SettingsDetailScreen chrome.
iOS Settings Form sections: env-coupled panes that own state, trigger store operations, and compose into Settings pages.

modules/Apps-Lillist-iOS-Sources-misc.md.summary: iOS container layer: TasksView lifecycle + store wiring, TaskEditorHost overlay, onboarding, and keyboard commands.

modules/Apps-Lillist-iOS-misc.md.summary: iOS app target config: xcodegen spec, Info.plist, entitlements, localization, and privacy manifest.

modules/Apps-Lillist-macOS-Sources-Hotke.summary: macOS global hotkey monitor, floating Quick Capture panel, hotkey-combo codec, and panel placement math

modules/Apps-Lillist-macOS-Sources-Prefe.summary: macOS Settings window: ten tabbed panes wiring user preferences back to LillistCore's store layer.

modules/Apps-Lillist-macOS-Sources-chunk.summary: macOS app entry point: AppEnvironment composition root, LillistApp scenes, and macOS-specific surfaces.
macOS status-bar Today popover and main task-list container with filter/sort/drag/editor lifecycle

modules/Apps-Lillist-macOS-misc.md.summary: macOS app bundle entitlements, Info.plist, privacy manifest, and macOS-only localization strings

modules/Apps-misc.md.summary: xcodegen spec generating the Lillist-macOS Xcode project (app + unit-test + UI-test targets)

modules/Extensions-ShareExtension-iOS.md.summary: iOS Share Extension that captures shared URLs/text as Lillist tasks via the App-Group-shared Core Data store.

modules/Extensions-ShortcutsActions-Enti.summary: App Intents entity layer: TaskEntity, StatusAppEnum, and EntityQuery bridge LillistCore DTOs to Shortcuts/Spotlight

modules/Extensions-ShortcutsActions-misc.summary: App Intents extension: Siri/Shortcuts actions for task CRUD and quick-capture, backed by CLIBridge handlers

modules/Packages-LillistCore-Sources-Lil.summary: Live incremental backup package + daily zip snapshots + schema-gated destructive restore for all LillistCore data.
CLIBridge handlers (Add–Purge): caseless-enum namespaces that resolve tokens and dispatch to stores.
CLIBridge handlers for restore, search, show, status, tag, tags, and watch verbs
CLI output formatters: convert store records to JSON/NDJSON/TSV/pretty-text for the lillist CLI.
CLIBridge shared infrastructure: store access, date parsing, task resolution, and filter flags.
Canary-based in-house crash reporter: detects crashes, redacts PII from logs, assembles opt-in user-mediated reports.
Opt-in JSONL event logger, Core Data history bridge, and zip-package exporter for in-app diagnostics
Versioned JSON backup/restore: Exporter writes lillist.json; Importer replays into Core Data.
SSRF-guarded URL unfurl pipeline: policy check → capped HTML fetch → OG/Twitter parse → attachment store write.
Hand-written @NSManaged entity subclasses; the explicit Core Data schema for all LillistCore persistent types.
Domain vocabulary enums (Status, SortField, NotificationKind, etc.) and the Core Data schema (.xcdatamodeld)
Notification scheduling: spec persistence, desired-vs-pending diff reconciliation, snooze registry, and authorization.
Fractional-index ordering math: midpoint insertion, underflow detection, compaction, and canonical sibling sort.
Core Data container lifecycle: sync-mode swapping, remote-change reconciliation, and store-recovery.
Recurrence rule model, calendar-aware date expansion, and series-spawn logic
EventKit bridge and crash-safe drain importer: converts a Reminders list into Lillist tasks
Smart-filter rule engine: Field/Op/Value/Leaf/PredicateGroup AST + NSPredicate compiler + parity Swift evaluator.
Six secondary stores (attachment/journal/prefs/series/smart-filter/tag) + TaskStore follow-up and tag-query extensions
TaskStore: the single async gateway for all LillistTask CRUD, status, reorder, archive, trash, and tag operations.
Sync-mode state machine, store reset/recovery, CloudKit error classification, and migration gate for extensions/CLI
CloudKit sync observability: SyncStatusMonitor actor, quiesce heuristic for migration gating, iCloudAccountState.
LillistCore cross-cutting: unified errors, device preferences, onboarding, Quick Capture handoff, logging.

modules/Packages-LillistCore-Sources-lil.summary: AsyncParsableCommand structs for lillist CLI verbs add–pin; parse args and delegate to CLIBridge handlers.
CLI command structs (purge–watch); each delegates to a CLIBridge handler.
CLI startup support: canary lifecycle, output flags, batch stdin, TTY detection, exit-code mapping.
Binary entry point for the lillist CLI: root command, subcommand registry, and LillistError-to-exit-code mapping.

modules/Packages-LillistCore-misc.md.summary: SwiftPM build plugin that compiles `.xcdatamodeld` to `.momd` so LillistCore entity loading works outside Xcode.

modules/Packages-LillistUI-Sources-Lilli.summary: Accessibility environment adapters, snapshot-test override keys, AX announcements, and WCAG contrast math
Reusable Rainbow Glass SwiftUI components: status chips, swipeable rows, sync dot, card chrome, and empty states
TaskRowView + TaskRowLabel: shared rendering atom for every task list row across iOS and macOS
SwiftUI crash-report consent UI: sheet + preview + @Observable view model bridging LillistCore.CrashReporter
Drag-reorder engine: gesture capture, @MainActor state machine, phantom overlay, drop-mutation resolver.
Task editor — TaskEditorModel draft-promote state machine + TaskEditorView quick/full UI + section views
Pure-presentation onboarding views: iCloud gate content, LocalOnly fallback screen, and feature/permission bullets
#tag/^date parser + macOS NSPanel view for single-field fast task capture
Form-based recurrence editor: SwiftUI view, value-type view model, and localized formatter for repeat rules.
Shared Settings primitives: iCloud sync section, crash-report preview, sort labels, time-picker.
Bridges LillistCore sync status onto UI SyncIndicatorMonitor; encodes tap-driven task status cycling.
Pure-presentation sync-modal surfaces (pause, disable, migration, recovery) unified under SyncSheetRoute.
Rainbow Glass design tokens: palette, glass seam, motion, elevation, status/sync/tag coloring.
Design tokens: spacing, radius, timing, Plus Jakarta Sans typography, and drag-reorder visual constants
Tree-building, outline row rendering, and filter/sort primitives for the iOS Tasks list.
iOS primary-screen and overlay surfaces: TasksScreen, Quick Capture dialog, FAB, toasts, sync badge, settings shell
LillistUI package root: namespace enum, version constant, Plus Jakarta Sans font, and string catalog

modules/Tools.md.summary: CI guard scripts (localization coverage, team-ID leak) and iOS archive build-number bump

modules/root-misc.md.summary: Workspace root: CI matrix, semver hooks, deployit export options, and xcworkspace binding all four targets.
